name: Smoked Turkey Grab'n Go -NHB
recipeIngredient: 4 large tortillas (flour or whole wheat, low-fat)
1/2 pound smoked turkey breast (or shredded, 1+1/2 to 2 cups)
8 ounces pepper jack cheese (or shredded, 2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tortillas on a plate and microwave on high for 10 to 15 seconds, or wrap tortillas in aluminum foil and warm for 10 to 15 minutes at 350°F in the oven.
2. In a small saucepan, heat honey and barbecue sauce until hot (do not boil).
3. Divide black beans, coleslaw mix, turkey, and cheese evenly over each tortilla.
4. Drizzle each with 2 tablespoons of the heated sauce.
[Makes 4 servings. Nutrients Per Serving: Calories: 522 Sodium: 1476 mg Carbohydrates: 52.6 g Protein: 33.1 g Cholesterol: 72.3 mg Dietary Fiber: 7.05 g Total Fat: 21.4 g Cal. from Fat: 36%]
